subcodes.first_line: O Glory of God! May thou ever fix thy gaze upon the countenance of the peerless Friend, and turn away from the stranger [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزه الله انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال بشطر دوست یگانه ناظر باشی و از بیگانه
subcodes.subjects: @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @transcendence; unknowability of God, @attaining good pleasure of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God
